pageContext.name: Mo-Lec-U-Lar
pageContext.description: With his ability to change shape and size to disguise himself as anyone or anything, Mo-Lec-U-Lar is one of the most dangerous criminals in the Limbo Galaxy!  This 7 scale highly articulated SilverHawks ULTIMATES! figure of Mo-Lec-U-Lar features detailed sculpting and includes interchangeable heads & hands as well as a variety of accessories including the transformation ring he uses to alter his form. One of the few things that can give away his disguised form is his shadow, so it might be safest to have this made-to-order ULTIMATES! figure in the spotlight of your collection, literally!
